audit_input.task_goal: make the one-legged hopper move forward while staying upright and controlled

audit_output.reason: The agent demonstrates strong forward velocity, maintains a healthy upright pose throughout the rollout, and survives for the full episode length. Energy cost is low, suggesting controlled movement. No evidence of reward hacking was found; the agent appears to be successfully performing the task based on the provided metrics. The proposed changes are minor refinements to reinforce desired behaviors.
